candidate_definition_hints.text: This repository provides a table of [IBC](https://github.com/cosmos/ibc) module combinations supported by [yui-relayer](https://github.com/hyperledger-labs/yui-relayer) and their E2E tests. The E2E tests are performed for each version of the yui-relayer.

candidate_glosses.text: This repository provides a table of [IBC](https://github.com/cosmos/ibc) module combinations supported by [yui-relayer](https://github.com/hyperledger-labs/yui-relayer) and their E2E tests. The E2E tests are performed for each version of the yui-relayer.
